calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Consolidation Of Arbitration Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER KIVA SALES & SERVICE, INC.'S PETITION FOR CONSOLIDATION OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS

Appearances: Evan S. Nadel of Kilpatrick Townsend (415.273.4804) for petitioner and moving party; Kieran Ringgenberg of Feuerstein Kulick LLP (510.775.7000) appearing via Zoom for Kind Op Corp.; Oren Bitan and Michael Fuoroli of Buchalter (213.891.0700) appearing via Zoom for Old Pal LLC

Argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)

** After the hearing, the Court grants the motion and signs a proposed order. **

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Consolidation Of Arbitration Proceedings
Off Calendar Jul-25-2023 Continued To Aug-07-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

RE:PETITIONER KIVA SALES & SERVICE, INC. Hearing On Petition For Consolidation Of Arbitration Proceedings.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff KIVA SALES & SERVICE, INC.'s Hearing on Petition for Consolidation of Arbitration Proceedings is continued to Aug-07-2023 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Under Seal
Off Calendar Jul-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Petitioner KIVA SALES & SERVICE, INC.'s Motion to File Under Seal.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's unopposed sealing motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
